common.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your school account

auth.selectSchoolDescription: You have access to multiple schools. Choose one to continue.
auth.noSchools: You do not have access to any schools.

mfa.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

register.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
register.successDescription: Your account has been created. Please check your email to verify your address, then log in.

errors.nameRequired: First name and last name are required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
settings.logoHint: Your school logo appears in the header and on login pages.
settings.logoFormats: PNG, JPG, SVG or WebP · Max 5 MB
settings.coloursDescription: Set your school's primary and secondary brand colours.
settings.generalDescription: Configure school-wide behaviour and module settings.
settings.inquiryStaleHoursDesc: Inquiries older than this are marked stale.
settings.sectionAttendanceDesc: Control how attendance records are managed.
settings.pendingAlertTimeHourDesc: Hour (0–23) when pending attendance alerts are sent.
settings.workDaysDesc: Select the days when school is in session. Attendance sessions can only be created on work days.
settings.requireGradeComment: Require comment when entering a grade
settings.requireApprovalForAcceptance: Require approval before accepting an applicant
settings.defaultPaymentTermDaysDesc: Number of days until an invoice is overdue.
settings.sectionPayrollDesc: Payroll run approval and calculation settings.
settings.payrollRequireApproval: Require approval for non-principal payroll runs
settings.defaultBonusMultiplierDesc: Multiplier applied to base bonus calculations.
settings.schedulingRequireApproval: Require approval for non-principal schedule changes
settings.maxSolverDurationSecondsDesc: Maximum time the scheduling solver is allowed to run.
settings.approvalsExpiryDaysDesc: Pending approvals expire after this many days.
settings.approvalsReminderAfterHoursDesc: Send a reminder if an approval is pending for this long.
settings.auditLogRetentionMonthsDesc: Audit log entries older than this are purged.
settings.stripeDescription: Connect Stripe to enable online payments for school fees.
settings.stripeConfiguredDesc: Your Stripe keys are stored securely. Only the last 4 characters are shown.
settings.stripeUpdateWarning: Updating these keys will replace your current Stripe configuration. Ensure you have the correct keys before saving.
settings.stripeSecretKeyHint: Starts with sk_live_ or sk_test_. Never shared publicly.
settings.stripePublishableKeyHint: Starts with pk_live_ or pk_test_. Safe to expose to the browser.
settings.stripeWebhookSecretHint: Starts with whsec_. Found in your Stripe webhook settings.
settings.stripeAllFieldsRequired: All three Stripe keys are required.
settings.stripeSecurityNote: All Stripe keys are encrypted at rest using AES-256. Only the last 4 characters are shown after saving.
settings.notificationsDescription: Control which notifications are sent and through which channels.
settings.notifNoSettings: No notification settings found. They will appear once the tenant is initialised.
settings.notifChannelsHint: Channel options are only available when a notification type is enabled.
settings.gradingWeightsDescription: Define how much each assessment category counts toward the final grade, per year group and term.
settings.selectYearGroupPrompt: Select a year group to configure grading weights.
settings.copyWeightsDescription: Copy all term weight configurations from the current year group to another.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
